description: Reports of items missing from a returned laundry order requiring facility review.

scenarios.customer_message: I'm missing a pair of socks from my last laundry order.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry about that. Could you share your order ID and details of the missing item so our team can look into it?

scenarios.customer_message: One of my formal shirts didn't come back with the delivery.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry to hear that. Please share your order ID and a description of the shirt so our team can investigate.

scenarios.customer_message: I sent 12 items but only received 10 back.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry for the discrepancy. Could you share your order ID and the missing item details so our team can review it?

scenarios.customer_message: My bedsheet set is incomplete, one pillowcase is missing.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry about that. Please share your order ID and details of the missing pillowcase so our team can help.
